title: Admins may see delays occur with several reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center
impact: Admins may see delays occur with several reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center.

updates.content:
Title: Admins may see delays occur with several reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center

User impact: Admins may see delays occur with several reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center.

More info: Affected reports include: 
- Visio Activity
- Project Activity
- Microsoft 365 Copilot Readiness
- Report
- Microsoft 365 Apps Usage

These reports may not reflect the most recent user activity during the impact window.

Current status: We've identified an issue where admins may see delays occur with several reports in Microsoft 365 Admin Center. Our investigation determined that this is due to a data processing issue causing timeouts with an upstream service. The upstream team has implemented a fix and the pipeline is actively recovering. We're monitoring as this progresses to provide a completion timeline.

Scope of impact: This issue may potentially impact any admin in Europe, Asia-Pacific, and North America attempting to view the affected reports in the More Info section.

Start time: Friday, April 10, 2026, at 12:00 AM UTC

Root cause: An issue with an upstream data pipeline responsible for populating reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center is causing reporting delays.

Next update by: Wednesday, April 15, 2026, at 8:00 PM UTC

Title: Admins may see delays occur with several reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center

User impact: Admins may see delays occur with several reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center.

More info: Affected reports include:
- Visio Activity
- Project Activity
- Microsoft 365 Copilot Readiness
- Report
- Microsoft 365 Apps Usage

These reports may not reflect the most recent user activity during the impact window.

Current status: We've confirmed that the pipeline has recovered and that a majority of admins are no longer seeing delayed reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center. Admins could potentially still experience a delay while our fix completes the necessary deployment which is projected by our next scheduled communication update.
 
Scope of impact: This issue may potentially impact any admin in Europe, Asia-Pacific, and North America attempting to view the affected reports in the More Info section.
 
Start time: Friday, April 10, 2026, at 12:00 AM UTC
 
Root cause: An issue with an upstream data pipeline responsible for populating reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center is causing reporting delays.
 
Next update by: Friday, April 17, 2026, at 8:30 PM UTC
